case_title: GILMER PEREZ VS. RED STICK ENTERPRISES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, GILMER AS TO DEFENDANT RED STICK ENTERPRISES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA TAPS AND DBA TAPS SOCIAL HOUSE AND KITCHEN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, GILMER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RED STICK ENTERPRISES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA TAPS AND DBA TAPS SOCIAL HOUSE AND KITCHEN $6,756.42 PRINCIPAL, $119.44 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,100.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
